sales.description:
LYDIA. Kroisos, 561-546 B.C. AR Siglos (1/2 Stater) (5.28 gms), Sardes Mint. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 4/5.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
SNG von Aulock-2877-9; Sunrise-11. Obverse: Confronted foreparts of lion right and bull left; Reverse: Two incuse square punches of unequal size.

From the John P. Burnham Collection.

Estimate: 200 - 400...
